description: Qwen Image Edit — instruction-based editing, 4 steps
prompt_guide: Give editing instructions, not scene descriptions. Be specific about what to change: 'change the background to a basketball court', 'add a gold border around the card', 'make the lighting more dramatic'. The model sees the input image, so reference existing elements: 'remove the text in the top left'. Keep instructions concise — one clear edit per generation works best.
